name: Parallel Multi-Agent Risk Assessment
description: Three specialist agents assess a document in parallel; results are merged and synthesised into a unified risk report.

agents.backstory: Experienced corporate lawyer specialising in contract risk, regulatory compliance, and liability exposure.
agents.goal: Identify legal risks, compliance gaps, and liability issues in documents.

agents.backstory: Senior financial analyst with expertise in cash flow risk, credit exposure, and financial covenant analysis.
agents.goal: Identify financial risks, cash flow concerns, and adverse payment terms.

agents.backstory: Engineering lead with deep experience in technical feasibility assessment, SLA analysis, and delivery risk.
agents.goal: Identify technical risks, unrealistic SLAs, and implementation concerns.

config.task_description:
Analyse the following document for legal risks, compliance issues, and liability exposure:

{{$.state.document}}
config.expected_output: A structured JSON object with keys: risk_level (low/medium/high), risks (array of findings), recommendations (array)

config.task_description:
Analyse the following document for financial risks, adverse payment terms, and cash flow concerns:

{{$.state.document}}
config.expected_output: A structured JSON object with keys: risk_level (low/medium/high), risks (array of findings), recommendations (array)

config.task_description:
Analyse the following document for technical risks, unrealistic SLAs, and implementation concerns:

{{$.state.document}}
config.expected_output: A structured JSON object with keys: risk_level (low/medium/high), risks (array of findings), recommendations (array)

nodes.label: Synthesise risk report
nodes.system_prompt: You are a risk committee chair. Synthesise three specialist risk assessments into a clear executive summary.
